title: Air India Express plane makes hard landing at Phuket airport; pictures show nose-wheel damage
content: An Air India Express flight from Hyderabad to Phuket encountered a nose-wheel issue during landing on Wednesday, causing a rough touchdown and a temporary suspension of airport operations. The Boeing 737 MAX 8 aircraft became stuck on the runway. The airline confirmed the incident, stating the crew followed all protocols and passengers were safely deplaned.

title: ‘India too good to think like that’: Gambhir shuts down pitch-tailoring claims
content: India's head coach Gautam Gambhir has strongly refuted claims of 'tailored' pitches favouring the home team, asserting India's strength makes such tactics unnecessary. He highlighted the team's consistent high scores globally, attributing them to player prowess and the T20 format's batting-friendly nature, not manipulated conditions. Gambhir also noted ICC oversight of pitches in global tournaments.

title: Oracle proves analysts wrong, reports best-ever quarter in 15 years
content: Oracle stunned Wall Street with its best fiscal quarter in 15 years, reporting a 22% revenue jump to $17.2 billion, driven by a massive 85% surge in cloud infrastructure. Despite a staggering $553 billion backlog, concerns linger over aggressive spending and a debt exceeding $100 billion, though the company explores new financing models.

title: 'Use induction': IRCTC tells vendors to switch cooking methods as Iran war disrupts LNG flow
content: Indian Railways is urging food vendors to switch to electric cooking methods like microwaves and induction, as liquefied natural gas (LNG) and LPG shortages, stemming from West Asia conflict, disrupt meal preparation. This impacts base kitchens supplying trains, prompting consideration of temporary suspension of cooked meal services and refunds for pre-booked meals.

title: Reset or continuity? Gambhir & Agarkar face big calls after T20 WC triumph
content: India's T20 triumph in 2024 validates Gambhir and Agarkar's tough selection calls, prioritizing team ethos over individual stardom. With the 2028 LA Olympics and T20 World Cup on the horizon, the duo faces the challenge of maintaining this philosophy, especially as they shift focus to the upcoming ODI World Cup. Their commitment to principles will be tested.

title: India 'great partner' in maintaining stable oil prices: US envoy on Russian imports
content: The US envoy Sergio Gor has praised India as a "great partner" for its role in maintaining stable global oil prices, acknowledging New Delhi's ongoing purchases of Russian oil. This temporary waiver, aimed at easing pressure on energy supplies amid Middle East tensions, reflects India's past cooperation with Western sanctions on Russia.

title: ‘Brain-dead’ woman jolted back to life by pothole in UP
content: A woman declared brain-dead in Uttar Pradesh miraculously revived after her ambulance hit a pothole on NH-74. Vineeta Shukla, with "no sign of life," began breathing normally following the violent jolt. Rushed to a Pilibhit hospital, she has since recovered and is now awake and talking.

title: USCIS issues 'alert', shares details of the form it will reject starting April 1
content: USCIS has updated Form I-129, effective April 1, 2026, requiring employers to detail educational and experience requirements for H-1B visa applicants. This change aims to align with the Department of Labor's wage level assignments and verify consistency between the Labor Condition Application and the registration process, impacting the upcoming FY27 H1B cap season.

title: Who is Harish Rana? Ghaziabad man in vegetative state at centre of SC euthanasia ruling
content: The Supreme Court has permitted passive euthanasia for Harish Rana, a 31-year-old man in a permanent vegetative state since 2013. His family's plea to withdraw life-sustaining treatment was granted after medical experts confirmed no signs of recovery. This decision aligns with the court's 2018 ruling on living wills and the right to die with dignity.

title: Inside Tamannaah Bhatia’s Rs 16.6 crore Juhu home
content: Actress Tamannaah Bhatia owns a luxurious Rs 16.6 crore apartment in Juhu, Mumbai. The 22nd-floor residence offers stunning Arabian Sea views. Interiors showcase contemporary design with soft pastel colors and curated furniture. The living room is elegant, featuring velvet sofas and designer pieces. The bedroom is tranquil, complemented by a walk-in closet and vanity. A balcony provides a perfect retreat.

title: N Korea backs Iran's Mojtaba, slams US-Israel for 'destroying regional peace'
content: North Korea expressed support for Mojtaba Khamenei's appointment as Iran's new supreme leader, respecting the Iranian people's choice. Pyongyang also condemned the "illegal" US-Israeli military attack that killed the previous leader, Ali Khamenei, citing it as a threat to regional peace and security. Kim Jong Un recently oversaw a missile test, emphasizing the need to expand North Korea's nuclear deterrent.

title: T20 WC: ICC explains why teams are still stranded, rejects bias claims
content: The ICC has addressed travel disruptions for teams after the 2026 T20 World Cup, citing a major Gulf region crisis impacting international air travel. Delays are due to airspace closures and flight cancellations, with the safety of players and families remaining the top priority as arrangements are made for their return.

title: Why is stock market down today? Sensex tanks over 1,000 points - top reasons for fall
content: Stock market crash today: Continuing geopolitical tensions weighed on Nifty50 and BSE Sensex on Wednesday with the indices tanking over 1%. While Nifty50 went below the 24,000 mark, BSE Sensex crashed over 1,000 points.

title: In a first, SC allows passive euthanasia for 31-year-old Harish Rana, in coma for 12 years
content: In a landmark decision, the Supreme Court has permitted the withdrawal of medical treatment for Harish Rana, a 31-year-old man in a vegetative state. The apex court has instructed Delhi's AIIMS to facilitate the discontinuation of life support for Rana, who has been in this condition for a considerable period.

title: UP man critically injured in Saudi Arabia projectile attack; family seeks help
content: A 27-year-old Indian diesel mechanic from Moradabad, Mohd Azam, was critically injured in Saudi Arabia when a military projectile struck a residential site in Al-Kharj. The incident, linked to the Iran-US-Israel conflict, also resulted in two deaths and multiple injuries among Bangladeshi nationals.

title: Airlines hike fares as Middle East conflict sends fuel costs soaring
content: Escalating US-Iran tensions are causing sharp volatility in oil markets and significantly impacting the aviation industry. Airlines are raising fares and fuel surcharges due to surging jet fuel costs and airspace restrictions, leading to flight cancellations and passenger disruptions. Oil prices are whipsawing amid uncertainty, with potential emergency reserve releases being considered.

title: 25 years of the historic 2001 India vs Aus Test: A rebirth at Eden Gardens
content: Twenty-five years ago, a struggling Indian cricket team, reeling from scandal, hosted Steve Waugh's formidable Australians. Against all odds, a remarkable turnaround at Eden Gardens, spearheaded by captain Sourav Ganguly and a young Harbhajan Singh, ignited a new era for Indian cricket, forever changing its destiny and inspiring a nation.

title: 2 killed as communal clash over council polls explodes in Meghalaya
content: Two people died in overnight violence in Meghalaya's West Garo Hills after clashes between the Garo community and supporters of non-tribal candidates for the GHADC elections. Mobile internet services were blocked and the Army was deployed following the unrest, which was triggered by a new rule requiring ST certificates for candidates.

title: UP teen approaches police to stop partially paralysed father’s 7th marriage
content: A 17-year-old boy in Azamgarh reported his 55-year-old father to the police after being beaten for opposing his seventh marriage. The father, Amarjeet Maurya, has a history of failed marriages, with previous wives leaving due to his refusal to transfer land. The son intervened to protect their ancestral property from further debt incurred for his father's marital pursuits.

title: Confirmed, deleted, then clarified: US U-turn on navy 'escorting' oil tanker in Strait of Hormuz
content: A US Energy Secretary's claim of escorting an oil tanker through the Strait of Hormuz was swiftly deleted and corrected by the White House, stating no such escort occurred. This caused market jitters, with oil prices fluctuating. Iran's Revolutionary Guards also refuted the assertion, calling it false. The Strait remains a focal point of regional tensions.

title: 'Reaching finals is no joke': Experts back Lakshya Sen despite All England heartbreak
content: Lakshya Sen once again fell short in the All England Open final, losing to Lin Chun-yi. This marks India's continued 25-year wait for a men's singles champion at the prestigious event. Despite reaching multiple finals, experts believe Sen's consistent presence at this level is a significant achievement, highlighting his strong mental and physical game.

title: Kangana Ranaut to play nurse in her next film 'Bharat Bhhagya Viddhaata': Report
content: Kangana Ranaut makes a powerful comeback in the impactful film 'Bharat Bhhagya Viddhaata', which poignantly recounts the 2008 Mumbai terror attacks with a focus on the resilience of healthcare workers at Cama Hospital. As a fearless nurse in a time of chaos, her character embodies the spirit of bravery among those who served under pressure. Read on to know more in detail.

title: 'Historic $300bn deal': US to get new oil refinery with Reliance backing; Trump calls it 'massive win'
content: India's Reliance Industries is set to invest in America's first new oil refinery in 50 years, planned for Brownsville, Texas.  US President Donald Trump announced the "historic" $300 billion deal, emphasising it will boost domestic energy production, create thousands of jobs, and strengthen national security.

title: 'Constantly humiliated, caused mental trauma': What Mumbai dentist wrote in chilling death note
content: A 24-year-old MDS student allegedly died by suicide in Mumbai, leaving a note accusing her boyfriend of mental harassment and humiliation. Police arrested the boyfriend, Fazal Mohammad Khan, after the student's parents filed a complaint. The suicide note details the emotional distress she reportedly endured during their relationship.

title: ‘A serious war is going on ... ’: Govt assures ‘no shortage of fuel’ amid LPG supply concerns
content: Union Minister Piyush Goyal assured India faces no fuel shortage despite global energy market volatility. The government has invoked the Essential Commodities Act, prioritizing domestic LPG and natural gas supply for households and vehicles. Measures are in place to manage supply disruptions linked to tensions around the Strait of Hormuz.

title: ‘I was born in Punjab, but made in Kolkata’: Harbhajan on historic 2001 Eden Test
content: Recounting a historic Test, Harbhajan Singh details his pivotal role in India's victory against Australia. He describes dismissing key batsmen like Matthew Hayden, Ricky Ponting, and Adam Gilchrist, leading to his career-defining hat-trick. The spinner highlights VVS Laxman and Rahul Dravid's monumental partnership and his own crucial wickets, including the controversial dismissal of Glenn McGrath, ultimately changing his life forever.

title: What happened at Epstein’s Zorro Ranch in New Mexico? ‘Macabre & strange’ claims surface
content: Authorities are now scrutinizing Jeffrey Epstein's Zorro Ranch in New Mexico following disturbing claims of a "baby factory" and the burial of victims. Local radio host Eddy Aragon's investigation into an anonymous tip about "macabre and strange" activities has prompted a significant police search of the property, which was recently sold.

title: 'Will take your English exam right here': SC junks AI-drafted PIL, schools Ludhiana trader
content: The Supreme Court dismissed a trader's PIL after he admitted using AI tools to draft it and couldn't explain legal terms. Chief Justice Surya Kant questioned the Ludhiana-based hosiery trader's understanding, even offering an "English exam.

title: Ram Gopal Varma says if Dhurandhar 2 hits Rs 2000 crore, south films will go for a toss
content: Renowned filmmaker Ram Gopal Varma anticipates that Aditya Dhar's upcoming project 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' could skyrocket to a phenomenal Rs 1500-2000 crore at the box office. He suggests that this movie has the potential to eclipse even the most successful South Indian films, which he critiques as relying heavily on traditional filmmaking techniques. Read on to know more in detail.

title: Middle East crisis: Jaishankar holds 'detailed conversation' with Iranian FM Araghchi
content: External affairs minister Subrahmanyam Jaishankar spoke with Iran's Foreign Minister Seyed Abbas Araghchi. They discussed regional developments and shipping security. Concerns were raised about maritime traffic through the Strait of Hormuz. Iran detailed recent attacks by the US and Israel. Both ministers emphasized strengthening bilateral ties and regional stability.

title: Bengaluru, Mumbai, Pune and more: Severe LPG crunch hits cities, 1000s of hotels affected
content: India faces a severe crunch in liquefied natural gas and commercial LPG supplies due to West Asian conflict disruptions. The government is reallocating gas, prioritizing domestic use. This has led to reduced industrial supply, impacting restaurants and hotels nationwide, forcing menu changes and even temporary closures as black marketing emerges.

title: Kanpur priest dragged out of temple, beaten by mob after photo of him eating 'non-veg' goes viral
content: A temple priest in Kanpur was assaulted by a mob after a photo, allegedly showing him eating non-vegetarian food, went viral on social media. Around 50-60 people attacked the priest at Bhuteshwar Temple, with some even slapping intervening women. Police rescued the priest and are identifying the accused.

title: 'Wilt, me, then Kobe': Adebayo scores 83 points
content: Bam Adebayo scored the most points since Wilt Chamberlain's iconic 100-point game in 1962 as the Miami Heat star went for 83 points in a blowout win over the Wizards.

title: Sources: Ravens nixed Crosby deal after physical
content: The Ravens have "backed out" of their agreement to acquire five-time Pro Bowl defensive end Maxx Crosby, with sources telling ESPN that medical concerns arose after a physical.

title: U.S. in jeopardy at WBC after upset loss to Italy
content: Italy stunned Team USA with an 8-6 victory in World Baseball Classic pool play Tuesday night, one of the biggest upsets in the tournament's 20-year history that puts the Americans in jeopardy of not advancing to the knockout round.

title: Sources: Doncic in custody battle for daughters
content: Lakers star Luka Dončić has separated from his fiancée, Anamaria Goltes, he told ESPN, and is in a custody battle over their two daughters, according to sources.

title: Celtics' Brown ejected, then takes to social media
content: Celtics guard Jaylen Brown was ejected in the second quarter of Tuesday's matchup at the Spurs after officials whistled him for back-to-back technical fouls.

title: Sources: Jets get their QB, trade for Geno Smith
content: The Jets are trading for the Raiders' Geno Smith, reuniting the quarterback with the team that drafted him in 2013, sources told ESPN's Adam Schefter on Tuesday.

title: Avs critical of MacKinnon ejection for goalie injury
content: The Avalanche sharply disagreed with the officials' decision to give star center Nathan MacKinnon a game misconduct for goalie interference in their 4-3 loss to the Oilers on Tuesday night.

title: Records fall as Dybantsa nets 40 in Big 12 opener
content: AJ Dybantsa poured in a Big 12 freshman-record 40 points, willing his No. 10-seeded Cougars to a 105-91 victory over No. 15 seed Kansas State in the first round of the conference tournament.

title: 🫧 Men's NCAA tournament Bubble Watch
content: Santa Clara's loss will have the Broncos sweating -- and Virginia Tech's saw the Hokies crash out of the bubble.

content: Even after Paige Bueckers departed for the WNBA, the Huskies kept rolling and are closing in on a repeat.

title: Atlético Madrid put one foot in Champions League quarterfinals as Spurs implode
content: Not even the Metropolitano faithful knew what to make of Atlético's stunning win, with Spurs making numerous critical errors.

title: WNBA CBA negotiations: Both sides continue to meet into Wednesday morning
content: League personnel and WNBPA staff met Tuesday evening at a hotel in midtown Manhattan. The meeting was still underway after 1 a.m. ET.

title: 'Man, just please come back safe': What it's like for an MLB team when its stars are in the WBC
content: While its top players are out taking on the world, we checked in on life back at home during spring training.

title: From college QB to Team USA starter in the WBC: The incredible rise of Nolan McLean
content: Eight starts into his MLB career, the Mets' budding ace is making himself at home in the U.S. rotation.

title: What to expect from Rosen, Jiricek, other top NHL prospects traded at the deadline
content: How will those players impact their new teams? When will they play meaningful minutes at the NHL level? Here are scouting reports on 10 big names.

title: Awards Watch: Celebrini challenges for MVP; dead heat for Norris
content: With about a month left in the season, here's how PHWA voters are feeling about all the major awards.

title: Latest mini NFL mock draft: Yates projects picks 1-10 based on the free agency frenzy
content: How has NFL free agency affected 2026 draft plans? Here are Field Yates' updated predictions for picks Nos. 1-10 after the first wave of deals.

title: Sources: Pats land Packers' Doubs on 4-year deal
content: The Patriots have agreed to sign former Packers wide receiver Romeo Doubs to a four-year deal worth up to $80 million, sources told ESPN.

title: Sources: TE Knox stays with Bills on new deal
content: The Bills found a way to keep tight end Dawson Knox on the 2026 roster amid a difficult cap situation by signing him to a new three-year contract, sources told ESPN's Jeremy Fowler on Tuesday.

title: Texans bolster O-line, reach deal with OT Smith
content: Free agent offensive tackle Braden Smith reached agreement with the Houston Texans on a two-year, $25 million contract that includes $13.5 million fully guaranteed, his agent told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

title: Source: WR Raymond leaves Lions to join Bears
content: Kalif Raymond has agreed to sign a one-year contract with the Bears, reuniting the wide receiver with Ben Johnson, a source told ESPN's Jeremy Fowler.

title: Source: LB Lloyd gets $45M deal with Panthers
content: Former Jaguars linebacker Devin Lloyd agreed to a three-year, $45 million deal with the Panthers, a source told ESPN's Adam Schefter on Monday.

title: Sources: Tua to sign 1-year deal with Falcons
content: Former Miami Dolphins quarterback Tua Tagovailoa plans to sign a one-year deal with the Atlanta Falcons, a source told ESPN's Adam Schefter.

title: Commanders land Oweh on 4-year, $100M deal
content: Former Chargers defensive end Odafe Oweh, who has 17.5 sacks since 2024, has agreed with the Commanders on a four-year, $100 million deal, his agents told ESPN.

title: Sources: QB Willis, Fins reach 3-year, $67.5M deal
content: Free agent QB Malik Willis, after reviving his career with the Packers, has agreed to a three-year, $67.5 million deal with the Dolphins, sources told ESPN.

title: NWSL ambition rankings: Which teams are raising standards, and which aren't trying enough?
content: The NWSL has teams that are building stadiums, signing stars and spending money. Meanwhile, other teams, well, aren't doing any of that.

title: Is 23 red cards in Brazilian mass brawl a world record? Not even close
content: A lot of red cards were handed out in Cruzeiro's win over Atlético-MG, but it's nowhere near the world record.

content: Fifty-three-years before the Supreme Court allowed Uttar Pradesh's Harish Rana to die, a 25-year-old nurse suffered a brutal sexual assault at Mumbai's King Edward Memorial Hospital

content: In the annals of history, transition often bears the weight of inherited legacy, and few legacies are as complex as that of Iran's Islamic Republic.

title: Stock Market LIVE: Sensex Drops, Nifty Down As Iran War Spooks Investors
content: Stock Market Today Live Updates: At 1 pm, the Nifty50 was trading 1.09% down at 23,997.90, and the Sensex was trading 1.32% down at 77,174.54.

title: How Everest, The World's Highest Mountain, Rose From An Ancient Ocean
content: Long before Mount Everest became the roof of the world, the rocks that form its summit were lying at the bottom of a sea. Today, the Himalayan peak rises to nearly 8,848 metres above sea level, making it the highest point on Earth.

title: Iran Says New Supreme Leader "Safe And Sound" Amid Injury Reports
content: Iran's new supreme leader Mojtaba Khamenei is "safe and sound" despite reports of an injury during the war with Israel and the United States, said the son of the Iranian president on Wednesday.

title: In Landmark Supreme Court Judgment, Ghaziabad Man Gets Right To Die
content: Harish Rana Euthanasia: Supreme Court Allows Passive Euthanasia For Ghaziabad Man In Vegetative State For 13 Years

title: Injured Or Hiding? Iran's New Ayatollah Remains Missing From Public View
content: It's been nearly four days since Iran named Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei as its next Supreme Leader, but his whereabouts and the circumstances of his elevation remain shrouded in mystery.

title: Social Media Ban For Children: Why The Policy May Be Hard To Enforce
content: Social media addiction has been linked to anxiety, reduced attention spans, sleep disorders and declining academic performance.

title: Opinion: Opinion | 'Gulf Allies Not Consulted': Will Middle East Now Turn Against Trump-Israel?
content: Speaking on his nation's television, a Kuwaiti analyst has gone on to say that the Arab countries are the ones protecting America, not the other way around.

title: Countries Where Euthanasia Is Legal
content: The Supreme Court on Wednesday granted a 31-year-old Ghaziabad man the right to die. Harish Rana, a student of Punjab University, has been in a persistent vegetative state for the past 13 years.

title: In Khamenei's Will, He Didn't Want Son To Be Iran's Supreme Leader: Report
content: Few people wanted Mojtaba Khamenei to become Iran's next supreme leader, not US President Donald Trump, and not even his own father.

title: UP Anti-Terrorism Squad Arrests Navy Lance Naik For Spying For Pakistan's ISI
content: The Uttar Pradesh Anti-Terrorism Squad (ATS) has arrested a 24-year-old Indian Navy Lance Naik on charges of spying for Pakistan's intelligence agency, the Inter-Services Intelligence (ISI), and sharing sensitive information related to naval assets.

title: Watch: Old Video Of Iran's Mojtaba Khamenei Standing In Line At Charity Event
content: Days after he became Iran's Supreme Leader, an old video of Mojtaba Khamenei in public interacting with people has surfaced on social media.

title: Iran-Israel War LIVE Updates: Iran Says New Supreme Leader Is 'Safe' Despite War Injury Reports
content: US-Israel-Iran War Live Updates: Iran launched fresh missiles and drones at targets across the Gulf, including oil infrastructure in Saudi Arabia and a ship off the coast of the Emirates.

title: 'No LPG Shortage': Mohan Yadav As Weddings Deferred, Businesses Hit
content: For the past two days, hotels and restaurants have been facing an acute shortage of commercial gas cylinders, raising fears of a wider supply crisis.

title: Energy Body Proposes Record Oil Reserve Release Amid Iran War: Report
content: The International Energy Agency (IEA) has proposed its largest ever release of oil reserves to counter soaring crude prices driven by the US-Israeli war with Iran, the Wall Street Journal reported Tuesday, citing officials familiar with the matter.

title: All About Jose Antonio Kast, Chile's New Hard-Right President
content: Jose Antonio Kast became Chile's president on his third attempt, becoming the country's most right-wing leader in over three decades by pledging a firm hand on security and order.

title: Bangladeshi Sari Weaving Tradition Hangs By A Thread Amid Dip In India Trade
content: Bangladesh's Tangail sari is fighting for survival as weavers warn that automation and economic pressures are pushing the centuries-old craft to the brink despite its global acclaim.

title: Gujarat To US: Bhadresh Patel, Among FBI's Most Wanted for Killing Wife
content: With a reward of $1 million on any information on him, the Federal Bureau of Investigation has ramped up the search for Gujarat native Bhadreshkumar Chetanbhai Patel, wanted for his wife's murder in the US.

content: The situation in West Garo Hills remained calm but tense on Wednesday (March 11, 2026), with the district administration extending the curfew till midnight of March 13 and continuing the suspension of mobile internet services, officials said

title: Ground-breaking for AM/NS steel plant on March 23: Andhra CM Chandrababu Naidu
content: “The Kadapa Steel Plant works would begin soon,” CM Chandrababu Naidu said, and expressed the government’s wish to complete them both by March 2028

title: Former panchayat president hacked to death by gang in Virudhunagar district
content: When he was near Villipathiri, an armed gang waylaid him at around 9 p.m. They pushed him off the bike and attacked him with weapons. He died on the spot, and the gang fled the scene

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election: Sowmiya Anbumani likely to enter the fray in a PMK stronghold
content: Highly placed sources in the PMK reiterated that Dr. Anbumani has a “very good equation” with the AIADMK and BJP and has managed to rule out the inclusion of his father S. Ramadoss in the National Democratic Alliance

title: CBI arrests Darwin Labs co-founder Ayush Varshney in ₹20,000 crore Gain Bitcoin scam case
content: Darwin Labs designed and developed the digital infrastructure which formed the operational backbone of the alleged fraudulent enterprise Gain Bitcoin

content: Chandrababu Naidu will review implementation of various flagship schemes of the coalition government and maintenance of law and order among other things

title: LPG shortage in country; 1 crore people to be unemployed: Kejriwal
content: Kejriwal accused Prime Minister Modi of "demolishing" India's non-aligned foreign policy of several decades and making Iran our "enemy"

content: Roadshow led by Minister Mohammed Riyas taken out in protest against his alleged exclusion from official inaugural event attended by Prime Minister Narendra Modi in Kochi

title: NCERT book row: Supreme Court directs Centre to form panel of domain experts to finalise legal studies course
content: Centre’s directive follows Supreme Court’s intervention over controversial NCERT’s Class 8 textbook, which contained ‘offending’ contents on corruption in the judiciary

title: Air India, its subsidiary to operate 58 flights to and from West Asia
content: While Air India will operate eight flights to and from Jeddah, Air India Express will be operating 14 scheduled flights to and from Muscat

title: Heatwave conditions likely in parts of Maharashtra, rain predicted in three division
content: According to IMD officials, a cyclonic circulation over South Jharkhand and adjoining North Chhattisgarh, combined with a trough line extending through Vidarbha, is influencing the weather pattern

title: 108 Maoists surrender in Chhattisgarh
content: Among the surrendered guerrillas, six were divisional commanders carrying a reward of eight lakh each

content: Increase in spacing between two supplies, supply of refills with 10-kg cooking gas may be evaluated if the situation West Asia war triggered prolongs

content: Devotees arriving in two-wheelers, four-wheelers and other private vehicles, except KSRTC buses, must park their vehicles at the Forest Department check-post

title: Eastern Railway felicitates women workforce for exemplary service
content: Eastern Railway appreciated women holding critical job roles in the railways like loco-pilots, guards, station managers, ticket collectors, booking clerks and more

title: Ahead of Modi’s Kerala visit, Kochi Corporation removes publicity materials welcoming PM citing ‘HC directions’
content: Kochi Mayor V.K. Minimol says move is ‘not politically motivated’ but carried out ‘strictly in compliance with Kerala High Court directions’

title: BRS flays Speaker’s verdict on Telangana MLAs disqualification petitions, terms it an assault on democracy
content: Former Minister Niranjan Reddy ridicules Leader of the Opposition Rahul Gandhi who regularly carries the Constitution

title: Amos TG on winning the Best Director award at the Kerala State Television Awards for his short film ‘Opponent’
content: Opponent explores the life of a boxer who accidentally kills his opponent during a match, which completely turns his life around. The short film won four honours at the television awards

title: Withdrawal of life support must not be an ‘act of abandonment’: Supreme Court judgment
content: J.B. Pardiwala and K.V. Viswanathan said the withdrawal of life support must not be a “single act” but a structured and clearly articulated withdrawal

title: Hyderabad Hostels Association issues notice cautioning of LPG shortage, recommend limited items on menu
content: The shortage has affected over 10 lakh residents across more than 11,000 PGs and hostels in Hyderabad, with many reporting a complete halt in LPG supply and zero stock, say Association members

title: Assam govt drops ex-President Fakhruddin Ali Ahmed's name from medical college in Barpeta
content: CM Himanta Biswa Sarma said all medical colleges im Assam are named after their locations, except for this; it does not align with our naming pattern

title: Parliament Budget session LIVE: FOMO Gandhi is afraid of not being the headline, Anurag Thakur says in Lok Sabha
content: Rajya Sabha continues discussion on the working of the Ministry of Rural Development; Opposition leaders have complained about the vacant deputy Speaker post, microphones being switched off, Opposition members being disallowed to speak, etc.

title: LPG crisis LIVE: Hotels face risk of closure as food sector stares at looming commercial gas shortage
content: With the widening West Asia conflict disrupting energy supplies, many hotels, restaurants across the country on Tuesday claimed that they were facing hardships due to a shortage of commercial LPG cylinders

title: Kerala CM, Ministers and some Congress leaders to boycott PM Modi’s Kochi event
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s Kochi visit to launch a host of projects in Kerala has attained political overtones with the State Ministers and a section of Congress leaders choosing to boycott it for various reasons

title: Arcelor Mittal, Nippon Steel invite EoI for steel fabrication unit in Andhra Pradesh
content: The company stated in the notification inviting EoI that the execution timeline for the steel fabrication unit will be up to four years

title: With AI, Karnataka is entering a new phase of industrial transformation: Minister M.B. Patil
content: Trust around AI must be built through strong ethical frameworks, transparent governance, and accountability

title: Allies in India have been good actors, have temporarily allowed New Delhi to accept Russian oil already at sea: White House
content: “As we work to appease this temporary gap of oil supply around the world because of the Iranians, we have temporarily permitted them (India) to accept that Russian oil,” said White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt

title: Supreme Court to pronounce judgment on withdrawal of life support to a 31-year-old man
content: The judgment by a Bench of Justices J.B. Pardiwala and K.V. Viswanathan may decisively draw the boundaries for when to allow natural death to take over

title: Reliance Industries seeking to maximise LPG output, divert natural gas to support priority sectors
content: The Union Govt has invoked the Essential Commodities Act, 1955, to re-prioritise allocation of both natural gas and LPG

title: A check dam on Musi to retain water for Gandhi Sarovar
content: Detailed project plans of the Musi rejuvenation and development are set to be unveiled by Chief Minister Revanth Reddy on March 13

title: VIT-AP University to collaborate with EESL to promote energy efficiency on campus
content: The announcement was made during the ongoing Energy Conservation Week at the VIT-AP campus in Amaravati.

title: Lessons from India’s C-DOT saga for technology development
content: The Centre for Development of Telematics heralded a communications revolution by developing indigenous rural telephone exchange technology; however, in the three months of K.P. Unnikrishnan as Minister for Communications, the project was derailed and a mass exodus of scientists began

title: What is cheaper to cook with, LPG or induction?
content: A gas flame is more inefficient because it loses nearly 60% of its heat to the surrounding air, but that is not the full picture

title: More women deleted from rolls in most States after SIR
content: Tamil Nadu is the only major State where the gender ratio improved slightly, despite the State recording one of the largest reductions in total electors

title: The 1952 Assembly election in Tamil Nadu, an illustration of the limits of poll manifestos
content: In the first elections held in 1951-52 after the country became a Republic with the system of a universal adult suffrage in place, the major contestants were the Congress and the Communist Party of India (CPI)

title: Sivaji Ganesan’s gift of baby elephant to American children and his U.S. visit as state guest
content: Sivaji Ganesan was invited to the United States as part of the U.S.–India Cultural Exchange Programme. During the trip, Sivaji was treated as a state guest, assigned two officials to assist him, and given a daily allowance of $160, a considerable sum at the time.

title: Kashmir banks on almond and tulip blooms to revive tourism hit after Pahalgam terror attack
content: J&K Chief Minister Omar Abdullah is set to inaugurate a spring festival later this week at Srinagar’s Badamwari, an almond garden that offers mesmerising blooming pink and white flowers

title: Bihar revenue officers’ association expresses objection over Deputy CM Vijay Kumar Sinha’s remarks
content: Deputy CM Vijay Kumar Sinha had said that some office bearers associated with the federation were allegedly acting as “agents of land mafias”; warned Circle Officers to call off strikes

title: Seven killed as mound of soil collapses at Gurugram construction site, two arrested
content: The incident occurred on March 10 evening at the Signature Global Society in Gurugram’s Sidhrawali area

title: CM says ‘DKS is younger than me, has a bright political future’ as Deputy CM hosts dinner to mark six years as Karnataka Congress chief
content: Congratulating Shivakumar on completing six years at the helm of KPCC, Chief Minister Siddaramaiah said his deputy’s sagacity, ideological commitment and hard work is a model for young leaders

title: West Asia conflict: Jaishankar holds ‘detailed’ conversation with Iranian counterpart Araghchi
content: It is not immediately known whether the sinking of an Iranian warship by the U.S. near Sri Lanka on March 4 figured in the conversation between the two leaders

title: India slams Pakistan’s airstrikes on Afghanistan during Ramzan
content: India's Permanent Representative to the UN, Harish Parvathaneni reiterated New Delhi's support for the UN Secretary-General's call for compliance with international law, including international humanitarian law, and for ensuring protection of civilians

title: Yelagiri Hills witness forest fire, two hectares of forest land destroyed
content: Following the incident, special teams have been formed for regular patrolling of vulnerable spots in the hills to prevent such accidents during summer

title: Women’s reservation in Parliament, State assemblies should be implemented: VIT Chancellor
content: The Chancellor said that inequality among women is not restricted to political representations but also in other areas like education and health care

title: Work to construct ₹65.98 crore ROB near Ambur commences
content: Funded under the Tamil Nadu Deposit Fund 2025-26, the two-lane bridge will be 600 metres long and 7.5 metres wide with at least 50 LED streetlights on the bridge and its service lanes

title: HPV vaccination drive sees 81% coverage in four T.N. districts
content: The vaccination programme, which was started in the four districts, was conducted in government and government-aided schools, an official said

title: K.K. Venugopal biography an attempt to come to terms with himself: N. Ram
content: Says the former Attorney General talks about himself in the book as to how he was an “accidental lawyer”.

title: LPG customers in panic mode in Chennai as West Asia war hits supply
content: Even customers with two cylinders are worried whether their liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) will last by the time the next one reaches them

title: Andhra CM Naidu orders steps to minimise impact of West Asia conflict
content: Reviewing other sectors, Mr. Naidu asked officials to focus on providing quality mid day meals and maintaining clean classrooms in schools and colleges across the State

title: PM to inaugurate ₹142-crore railway projects in Kerala on March 11
content: PM Modi will inaugurate redeveloped railway stations at Shoranur Junction, Kuttippuram and Changanassery under the Amrit Bharat Station Scheme

title: Odisha hotel and restaurant association flags LPG cylinder shortage issue
content: The hotel and restaurant industry provides livelihood to thousands of employees and supports numerous allied sectors including food supply chains, transport, and local vendors while this disruption will have wider ramification on livelihood, says the association

title: Terrorist killed as Army foils infiltration bid in J&K’s Nowshera
content: Movement of two terrorists was observed in Jhangar area at around 3 p.m. on Tuesday, says Army; one Pakistan-sponsored terrorist was eliminated, and troops have been reoriented to search for the second terrorist, it adds

title: Experts deliberate on North East security at seminar hosted by Assam Rifles
content: The seminar was held at the Major General Samir Sinha Auditorium at USI and brought together senior military officers, security experts, academics and media representatives to deliberate on the evolving security landscape in the region

title: Union Cabinet approves international status for Madurai airport
content: The new status is expected to allow more regular international routes and easier approvals for foreign airlines

title: Exoneration in departmental inquiry will not automatically eclipse criminal prosecution in every bribery case: Karnataka High Court
content: In essence, departmental exoneration may influence, but does not automatically extinguish, criminal prosecution.

title: SC to pronounce verdict in family’s plea to withdraw life support to man in ‘permanent vegetative’ state
content: A Bench of Justices J.B. Pardiwala and K.V. Viswanathan is scheduled to deliver the verdict on the case, which was reserved for final decision on February 15 this year, tomorrow (March 11)

title: Tamil Nadu State Planning Commission calls for legal protection and social security for gig workers
content: In a study, ‘Status of Platform Based Gig Workers in Tamil Nadu,’ the Commission highlights the rapid expansion of platform-based work and calls for targeted interventions to ensure welfare, protection, and long-term sustainability for these workers

title: Committed to protecting the Aravalli hills, says  Bhupender Yadav
content: Minister said that the government is considering the setting up of a High Powered Committee on the matter, as directed by the Supreme Court

title: Opposition walks out of Rajya Sabha as debate on Bengal voter roll revision is denied
content: As Opposition parties raise the Special Intensive Revision in West Bengal, Leader of the House and Union Minister J.P. Nadda reminds them there was a detailed debate on electoral reforms

title: Mass suspensions, mics switched off: Opposition talking points in debate on resolution to remove Speaker
content: Opposition MPs also pull up the government over the failure to appoint a Deputy Speaker for last 12 years

title: Mamata ends SIR stir, says game is not yet over
content: During her five-day protest, the West Bengal Chief Minister and her party aides targeted the Election Commission of India; the Commission is working as ‘an agent of the BJP to snatch voting rights away’ from the people of the State, she says

title: Cabinet nod for 23% hike in cost of link road from Noida airport to Delhi-Mumbai Expressway
content: Revised cost of project is ₹3,630 cr; project to be developed on Hybrid Annuity Mode in Haryana, U.P.; 11 km of 31-km link road will be an elevated highway

title: MMA divisional rankings: Borralho bounces back, lands in middleweight top 5
content: caio Borralho has landed in a higher position in ESPN's divisional MMA rankings . he defeated Reinier de Ridder by unanimous decision in the co-main event of UFC 326 in Las Vegas . the victory boosted him up two spots to no. 5 in the 185-pound ranking . it was a second straight loss, but he remains at no. 9.

title: The stats behind Spurs' 17th-minute subbing out of GK Kinsky vs. Atlético
content: Antonn Kinsky was substituted just 17 minutes into the UEFA champions league tie . the keeper was so humiliating that former keeper Joe Hart called the game for TNT Sports . Nicol says he is "heartbroken for the lad" after his disastrous start .

title: Live tracking NFL free agency: Updates on signings, trades, cuts and rumors
content:
Adam Schefter tells Pat McAfee that Romeo Doubs is heading to the Patriots and explains what that now means for A.J. Brown's chances of heading to New England. (1:41) NFL free agency  officially begins at 4 p.m. ET on Wednesday, with the start of the new league year. But as of Monday at noon ET, when the legal negotiation window opened, teams can agree to terms with players. Quarterback  Malik Willis  is signing with the Dolphins and  Tua Tagovailoa  is signing with the Falcons, but which team could be interested in  Kyler Murray ? What's the latest on edge rusher  Trey Hendrickson ? And which big-name players are available as trade candidates? We're tracking all the action of 2026 NFL free agency. Follow along live here with the latest signings, trades, cuts and contract restructures. 2026 NFL free agency coverage: 
 Top 100 rankings  |  Grading big moves 
 Winners, losers  |  Mini mock draft

title: Excuse me?! All the records Adebayo broke in his 83-point night
content: the Miami Heat big man erupts for 83 points for the Heat . he passes Kobe Bryant's iconic 81-point performance . Adebayo set records for most free throws made (36) and attempted (43) in an NBA game .

title: 'Like they robbed a bank in broad daylight': CFB's unique tampering etiquette
content: coach Dabo Swinney calls out Ole Miss for "blatant" tampering . he says school tried to lure a Clemson player into the transfer portal . coach says he bailed for more money at Ole miss .

title: Ranking the top 25 players in the field
content: the PGA Tour is heading to The Players, its flagship event at the 123-man field . the players has a $25 million purse, with $4.5 million and 750 FedEx Cup points going to the winner . defending champion Rory McIlroy defeated J.J. Spaun in a Monday playoff last year .
